# 📝 {{project-name}} — Technical Decisions Log (ADR)

> **Purpose**: record every important technical decision so they remain traceable and understandable.
> Format reference: [Architecture Decision Records](https://adr.github.io/).

---

## ADR Template

Copy the template below to record a new decision:

```markdown
### ADR-{number}: {title}

- **Date**: YYYY-MM-DD
- **Status**: ✅ Adopted / ❌ Deprecated / 🔄 Superseded
- **Decision maker**: {person/agent}

#### Context
> Why is this decision needed? What problem are we facing?

#### Options

| Option | Pros | Cons |
|------|------|------|
| Option A | ... | ... |
| Option B | ... | ... |

#### Decision
> Which option did we pick?

#### Rationale
> Why this option?

#### Impact
> What will this decision affect?
```

---

## Decision Records

### ADR-001: {{first-decision-title}}

- **Date**: {{date}}
- **Status**: ✅ Adopted
- **Decision maker**: {{decision-maker}}

#### Context
> {{context-description}}

#### Options

| Option | Pros | Cons |
|------|------|------|
| {{option-A}} | {{pros}} | {{cons}} |
| {{option-B}} | {{pros}} | {{cons}} |

#### Decision
> Chose **{{chosen-option}}**.

#### Rationale
> {{rationale}}

#### Impact
> {{impact}}
